title: About Rachel - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South and South Bedfordshire - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South & South Bedfordshire
text_excerpt: About Rachel - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South and South Bedfordshire - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South & South Bedfordshire Skip to main content In Luton South and South Bedfordshire Constituency News In Parliament Parliamentary News Parliamentary Contributions Written Questions Newsletter Sign up for my email updates! About Rachel Contact Rachel Office Standards More Menu About Rachel Having served as the MP for Luton South between 2019 and 2024, it’s a privilege to be elected to represent the new constituency of Luton South & South Bedfordshire in Parliament. Bedfordshire is my county, and Luton is my home. I was born in the Luton & Dunstable hospital and have lived in Luton almost all my life. I’m proud of our area and all our communities, whether they be urban or rural. Throughout my life I have always been guided by a commitment to public service. Before entering Parliament, I was a senior manager in the public sector and a local councillor for nine years. I will always be a voice for all of our communities from the House of Commons green benches. After 14 years of the Conservatives, people are worse off, and nothing works anymore. Our Labour Government is turning the page on decline and despair, prioritising wealth creation to make the country better off, restoring economic stability and cutting NHS waiting lists. Together, we can deliver our mission of national renewal and change. Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Francis Steer on behalf of Rachel Hopkins both at 3 Union Street, Luton, LU1 3AN ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
